top_signals.title: Pentagon identifies American soldiers killed in Iranian attack in Jordan
top_signals.summary: 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Sustainability Reporting Guidance 2026-27
top_signals.summary: Guidance on sustainability reporting requirements for central government annual reports and accounts, which may be used by other public sector bodies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mixed signals, research findings, and policy judgements − speech by Catherine L. Mann
top_signals.summary: Given at the Natixis CIB Private Debt Forum

top_signals.title: Midwest sunset: Trump’s tariffs hit America’s farming powerhouse
top_signals.summary: The US is on the verge of losing its status as the world’s leading agricultural exporter

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: A Dangerous Game in the Arctic
top_signals.summary: Trump’s demands could derail progress on allied defense.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: America’s Trillion-Dollar Failure
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon is broken, but Congress can fix it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: More than 1,000 domains illegally streaming World Cup games seized, DOJ says
top_signals.summary: Over the course of the World Cup tournament, the Department of Justice seized more than 1,000 domains for illegally streaming games.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to drop; borrowing costs rise on Burnham’s ‘fiscal flexibility’
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM FTSE 100 liveblog. It’s Tuesday morning and the markets are waking up to the first full day of Andy Burnham’s Labour government. Burnham shocked Westminster and the City on Monday evening when he appointed John Healey as his Chancellor, just weeks after he had resigned in protest as defence [...]
